rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deposition Of Rimma Borokhov
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 6, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Rimma Borokhov GRANTED. Rimma Borokhov shall appear for additional 3 hours of deposition. Deposition shall be limited to events relating to the leak and asbestos contamination occurring after February 22, 2013 and not covered in the Supplemental Responses to Form Interrogatories. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN ARMOR VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS THE ORIGINATOR
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 6, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Continued to July 2, 2014. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than June 16, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
